scripts.test:build-ai: bun test/build-ai-1x1.test.ts && bun test/build-ai-1x2.test.ts && bun test/build-ai-1x3.test.ts && bun test/build-ai-C.test.ts && bun test/build-ai-J.test.ts && bun test/build-ai-L.test.ts && bun test/build-ai-PLUS.test.ts && bun test/build-ai-S.test.ts && bun test/build-ai-SR.test.ts
scripts.test:all: npm run test:headless && npm run test:build-ai && npm run test:e2e:local:quick
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint && npm run lint:unused && npm run lint:circular && npm run lint:duplicates
